education.institution: Thomas Jefferson High School for Science and Technology
details: Coursework: AP Biology, AP Computer Science, Research Statistics 1

bullets.label: LLM Finetuning
bullets.text: Created a manually annotated 500+ sample dataset for parameter-efficient finetuning of an 8-billion parameter language model. Achieved a 25% performance improvement over a LLaMA 70B baseline in relationship and entity extraction tasks for legal court filings.

bullets.label: High-Performance Computing (HPC)
bullets.text: Ran training pipelines and evaluation metrics on A100 80GB GPU clusters using Slurm to send experiment jobs. Used Ollama for local model deployment and testing.

bullets.label: Empirical Evaluation & Data Analysis
bullets.text: Evaluated the fine-tuned model against both the model prior to fine-tuning and another baseline over thirty trials. Conducted rigorous statistical analyses to establish normality, correct for covariance, and validate statistical significance across trials.

bullets.label: Infrastructure Management
bullets.text: Maintained 30+ Debian-based workstations supporting a user base of over 60 students and faculty. Deployed and managed a web-based UI infrastructure enabling remote desktop access for 50+ concurrent users.

bullets.label: Cluster Administration
bullets.text: Maintained a 50+ node compute cluster. Deployed containerized virtual environments and optimized high-performance compute resources for the neuroscience laboratory.

projects.title: Watermarking Diffusion Language Models
projects.text: Independent project mentored by a George Mason University faculty member involving the creation of a robust method for applying a watermark to diffusion language model generated text.

projects.title: BioBlitz
projects.text: Built and deployed a full-stack educational web platform serving 300+ active users with over 1000 completed assessments for MCAT or Biology Olympiad preparation. Implemented a recommendation system and Elo-based scoring algorithm. Utilized A/B testing to optimize platform analytics and user engagement.

awards.title: United States of America Computing Olympiad (USACO)
United States of America Biology Olympiad (USABO)

skills.items: High-Performance Computing (HPC), System Administration, Knowledge Graphs, Statistical Data Analysis
